agentApp.lab.boundary.noRegistry: Does not write to command, skill, artifact, or workspace global registries.

agentApp.lab.description: The Lab connects Agent App package review, cache verification, installed state, setup, permissions, launch, App Manager, and cleanup preview without entering the production path.

agentApp.lab.guard.title: Entry Runtime Guard
